measurement_path: vector-isolated cosine recall@10 via local ONNX provider primeBatch/primeQuery (no FTS/RRF; fail-closed on fallback)
hybrid_sensitivity_note: hybrid end-to-end recall@10 on these fixtures is per-sample identical across multilingual-e5, ruri-v3-30m and the hash fallback (FTS dominates top-10 membership), so it cannot discriminate embedding models and is not used as the A/B measurand

slice_definitions.mixed: bilingual-50 pattern mixed-content_mixed-query vector recall@10 mean
slice_definitions.ja: bilingual-50 patterns ja-content_en-query + en-content_ja-query vector recall@10 mean

reproducibility: bun run scripts/s154-embedding-shadow-ab.ts (requires local ONNX models; uninstalled candidates are recorded as skipped)
